{{Quote|This is one cantina in a fair-size city in a whopping big ''galaxy,'' stranger.|Merl|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 29">[[Star Wars (1977) 29|''Star Wars'' (1977) 29]]</ref>}}
'''Merl''' was the owner and [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] of a [[Merl's|tavern]] located in [[Old Town (Centares)|Old Town]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Centares/Legends|Centares]]. He smuggled food to [[Tyler Lucian]] until [[Death/Legends|killed]] in a firefight with [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]], who was searching for Lucian.

{{Char-stub}}
